name: WoofBot (without Lightning)
description: A chatbot for your personal node
compose:
name: slashnode-woofbot
services:
  web:
    image: woofbot/woofbot:v0.9.8
    container_name: woofbot-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - mongodb
    environment:
      MONGODB_URI: mongodb://woofbot-mongodb:27017/woofbot
      APP_PORT: '8080'
      APP_SEED: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      APP_BITCOIN_NODE_IP: ${bitcoind.exports.rpc.host}
      APP_BITCOIN_RPC_USER: ${bitcoind.exports.rpc.user}
      APP_BITCOIN_RPC_PASS: ${bitcoind.exports.rpc.password}
      APP_BITCOIN_RPC_PORT: '8332'
      SERVER_LOGS_FILEPATH: /app/logs/server.log
    volumes:
      - web_data-server-logs:/app/logs
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8092:8080
  mongodb:
    image: mongo:4.4.6-bionic
    container_name: woofbot-mongodb
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data-db:/data/db
      - mongodb_data-db-diagnostic.data:/data/db/diagnostic.data
      - mongodb_data-db-journal:/data/db/journal
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-server-logs:
    name: slashnode-woofbot_web_data-server-logs
  mongodb_data-db:
    name: slashnode-woofbot_mongodb_data-db
  mongodb_data-db-diagnostic.data:
    name: slashnode-woofbot_mongodb_data-db-diagnostic.data
  mongodb_data-db-journal:
    name: slashnode-woofbot_mongodb_data-db-journal
